title: rosa afzeliana var. stebleri
intro: Rosa afzeliana var. stebleri, also known as the Rosa stebleri or Indian rose, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana var. stebleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
